preview_evidence: No visual UI changed; review focused on whether the pipeline structure now matches the accuracy-first MIR design.

summary.rationale: The refined audio path now separates rhythm, stem separation, harmony scoring, and smoothing stages, which fits the intended architecture.

notes: Stage boundaries are explicit and uncertainty remains structured.
Demucs-first architecture is now represented directly in the extraction layer.
Avoided collapsing extraction and theory interpretation together.
Kept review guidance explicit for fallback conditions.

next_steps: Add browser evidence only if a user-facing analysis UI is introduced later.
